name: Minimal Vague Input — Cell Signaling
qualityCriteria: Generated a meaningful diagram despite minimal input
At least 5 nodes present representing signaling steps
Flow direction is clear (signal reception to cellular response)
Contains biologically plausible terms (receptor, kinase, transcription, etc.)
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: The AI should infer a generic cell signaling cascade (ligand -> receptor -> signal transduction -> transcription factor -> gene expression) from minimal input.
